env.OMC_COMPAT_NOTE: Pass-through hook: preserve runtime parity without blocking prompts.
Session lifecycle wiring for plugin compatibility.
Tool lifecycle wiring remains non-blocking by default.
Permission flow is delegated to standard Copilot policy behavior.
Post-tool success events are wired for observability parity.

PostToolUse.bash: python -m omc_copilot.cli.notify send --provider slack --message "PostToolUse event" || true
PostToolUse.powershell: python -m omc_copilot.cli.notify send --provider slack --message "PostToolUse event"; exit 0

env.OMC_COMPAT_NOTE: Send a simple notification on PostToolUse.

PostToolUseFailure.bash: cat >/dev/null; printf '%s' '{"additionalContext":"omc-copilot day-one compatibility mode is active. Use omc-copilot doctor for environment checks and omc-copilot run --mode ultraqa for remediation loops."}'; exit 0
PostToolUseFailure.powershell: $input | Out-Null; Write-Output '{"additionalContext":"omc-copilot day-one compatibility mode is active. Use omc-copilot doctor for environment checks and omc-copilot run --mode ultraqa for remediation loops."}'; exit 0

env.OMC_COMPAT_NOTE: Failure hook adds remediation guidance while keeping command flow stable.

PostToolUseFailure.bash: python -m omc_copilot.cli.notify send --provider slack --message "PostToolUseFailure event" || true
PostToolUseFailure.powershell: python -m omc_copilot.cli.notify send --provider slack --message "PostToolUseFailure event"; exit 0

env.OMC_COMPAT_NOTE: Subagent lifecycle start is wired for OMC pipeline visibility.
Subagent lifecycle stop is wired for OMC pipeline visibility.
Compaction hook is wired to preserve deterministic runtime cadence.
Agent stop hook is mapped through Stop for VS Code compatible payloads.
Session termination hook is wired for lifecycle parity.

SessionEnd.bash: python -m omc_copilot.cli.notify send --provider slack --message "Session ended" || true
SessionEnd.powershell: python -m omc_copilot.cli.notify send --provider slack --message "Session ended"; exit 0

env.OMC_COMPAT_NOTE: Send a notification on session end.
